entries.title: Laia dashboard, recovery, and Hermes chat
entries.summary: June 10 focused on making Laia more operationally reliable: secret recovery was formalized, stale dashboard state was cleaned up, and a native Hermes chat integration was built and pushed for the custom dashboard.
bullets: Installed pass and GnuPG, initialized a local Laia password store, and captured the current required Laia credentials without exposing secret values.
Enhanced the Laia bootstrap and recovery tooling so secrets can be captured into pass and materialized back out later, with HERMES_HOME override support and updated recovery documentation.
Removed stale Home chores and Secrets dashboard content from the authoritative dashboard state and fixed the generator and allowlists so those modules should not reappear unexpectedly.
Verified the cleaned dashboard modules and pushed the resulting Laia repository changes to GitHub.
Added a follow-up chore to read private PR #147 in levin-riegner/state-of-all-marketplace.
Implemented a native Talk to Hermes panel in the custom Laia dashboard with session list, new conversation, branch, message history, and chat input UI.
Added Cloudflare Worker proxy routes for Hermes status, sessions, messages, chat, and fork operations while keeping the Hermes API key out of the browser.

Verified the Hermes dashboard chat work with static tests, Worker and inline JavaScript syntax checks, Wrangler dry-run build, and local browser preview; pushed commit 020e90d, with deployment still dependent on Cloudflare credentials and a reachable Hermes API URL.

entries.title: Laia dashboard redesign and persistence groundwork
entries.summary: Refined Laia into a lighter, denser operational dashboard, improved email triage behavior, and laid the foundation for persistent shared lists and daily work history.
bullets: Reworked the Laia dashboard into a lighter editorial layout with a compact utility header, improved module titles, and better above-the-fold density.
Updated email radar logic to suppress self-authored outgoing mail, focus on incoming user-addressed messages, and include suggested replies for likely actionable email.
Added persistent dashboard data support for Home chores and Internal projects, seeding internal projects with Secrets and TextChest.
Built direct editing UI for personal list modules and moved the persistence design toward a Cloudflare/GitHub-backed shared state instead of browser-local storage.
Created and syntax-checked a Cloudflare backend endpoint intended to save dashboard list edits by committing dashboard.json back to GitHub.
Investigated Cloudflare static-assets deployment limits after secret binding failed, documenting the need for a real Worker or compatible Functions deployment shape.
Verified key changes with Python compile checks, Node syntax checks, local browser preview, and git commits/pushes to the remote repository.

modules.title: Agent routine
modules.summary: Weekday watcher cadence at :00 and :30 from 09:00 through 18:00.

cards.title: Step 1
cards.body: Poll Gmail via read-only OAuth; do not send, label, archive, or modify anything.

cards.title: Step 2
cards.body: Compare recent mail against Hermes last-seen state, not unread status.

cards.title: Step 3
cards.body: Filter obvious noise and spam-like patterns before surfacing anything.

cards.title: Step 4
cards.body: Separate likely replies from FYI mail and draft a useful suggested response.

cards.title: Step 5
cards.body: Notify only when something relevant exists.

cards.title: Step 6
cards.body: Refresh this dashboard so the website stays aligned with the latest watcher state.

modules.title: Chores
modules.summary: Loose operational follow-ups to keep visible on the main dashboard.
items: Pending: rerun cloudflared connector with sudo so it installs as a root/system service and survives reboot before user login.

modules.title: Agent operating rules
modules.summary: What the agent can do, what it will not do, and how the dashboard stays in sync.

cards.title: Automation safety
cards.body: No email auto-replies or mailbox mutations are enabled.

cards.title: Sync policy
cards.body: Remote repo state is authoritative; dashboard history is appended nightly.
